title: How to Build PoF with PoF + UE5

steps.label: Character Foundation
steps.description: Base character class, game mode, player controller, and core movement (walk, sprint)

decisions.rationale: Abstract base with movement defaults, orient-to-movement, ASC, motion warping, attribute init from DataTable+CurveTable. Well-structured with clear movement gating, acceleration curves, and root motion tracking.

Concrete player subclass with health/mana, XP/leveling, attribute allocation, ability loadout, interaction scanning, cursor aim, death/respawn, perception stimuli, overhead widget. Comprehensive delegates for UI binding.

Camera-relative movement via Enhanced Input with Swizzle/Negate modifiers. Diagonal normalization. Respects camera yaw rotation (Q/E). CanMove() gate blocks input during dodge/attack/stagger/stun/root motion.

Hold-shift sprint with smooth MaxWalkSpeed interpolation, stamina drain (20/s) with regen delay (1s), auto-stop when stationary, re-engage when moving again, FOV offset (+5), spring arm pullback (+100), exhaustion handling.

Space to dodge with directional montage selection (4-way + default fallback), custom movement mode with quadratic ease-out, wall sliding, invulnerability (timer or anim-notify driven), cancel window (last 40%), stamina cost (25), cooldown (1s), delegates for VFX/SFX.

Spring arm at -55 pitch with camera lag, zoom (scroll wheel, 600-2000 range), Q/E rotation (45-degree steps with interpolation), collision probe, movement sway (roll on strafe, pitch on forward/back).
Sets DefaultPawnClass to AARPGPlayerCharacter and PlayerControllerClass to AARPGPlayerController. Minimal but correct.
Persistent progression data, play time tracking (1s timer), map transitions with pre/post delegates, save system integration via subsystem, sync to/from save data.

steps.label: Camera & Input System
steps.description: Camera setup, input mapping context, enhanced input actions

decisions.rationale: Full Enhanced Input with 15+ actions, WASD/mouse/hotbar/pause all wired. Clean CDO sub-object pattern.
IA_Move, IA_Look, IA_Interact, IA_PrimaryAttack, IA_Dodge, IA_Sprint, IA_Zoom, IA_RotateCamera, IA_Pause, IA_UsePotion, IA_AbilitySlot1-4 with IMC_Default.
Spring arm with lag, collision, Q/E rotation, mouse wheel zoom, sprint FOV/arm offset, movement sway. All smoothly interpolated.

Added speed-dependent rotation rate (720 idle → 360 at speed), exposed terrain properties (step height 55, walkable angle 50, braking 2400, perch width 40), horizontal velocity maintenance on ramps, all as designer-tunable UPROPERTYs.

gotchas: UCharacterMovementComponent::PerchRadiusThreshold controls how close to ledge edges the character can stand
bMaintainHorizontalGroundVelocity is key for consistent speed on ramps/slopes

steps.label: Input Handling
steps.description: Enhanced Input, rebinding, gamepad

decisions.rationale: 16 input actions with correct value types (Axis2D, Axis1D, Boolean) created as CDO sub-objects. Added IA_RotateCameraAnalog for gamepad smooth camera rotation.
IMC_Default with full KB/M bindings (WASD, mouse, Q/E, 1-5, Escape) plus complete gamepad bindings. Swizzle/negate modifiers for 2D axis composition.
Runtime RemapAction() preserves modifiers/triggers, chains re-remaps, saves/loads via USaveGame. ResetBindingsToDefault() reverses all rebinds. FindInputActionByName() for UI integration.

Full gamepad: left stick move (deadzone), right stick camera/zoom (deadzone+negate), face buttons (ABXY), shoulders (LB/RB camera rotate), triggers (LT sprint, RT attack), D-pad ability slots, Start pause. Tunable deadzone properties.
SetInputModeGameOnly/UIOnly/GameAndUI with automatic cursor show/hide. Pause menu refactored to use these. Auto-cursor toggle on device switch via InputKey override.
PushInputContext/PopInputContext for IMC stacking with priority. Enables vehicle, swimming, menu contexts via the Enhanced Input subsystem's built-in priority system.

gotchas: APlayerController::InputKey(FInputKeyParams) is final in UE 5.7 — override InputKey(const FInputKeyEventArgs&) instead, include InputKeyEventArgs.h. Use Params.IsGamepad() for device detection.

steps.label: Physics & Collision
steps.description: Profiles, materials, projectiles, destruction

decisions.rationale: 4 custom channels (Projectile, Interactable, WeaponTrace, Destructible) in DefaultEngine.ini with 3 named profiles. ARPGCollisionChannels.h provides typed constants.
UARPGPhysicalMaterial extends UPhysicalMaterial with EARPGSurfaceType enum (10 types), per-material impact VFX/SFX/footstep sound, and scale multiplier.

Enhanced AARPGProjectile with gravity scale, bounce (configurable count/bounciness), homing (acceleration-based), area-of-effect damage with distance falloff, impact VFX/SFX, surface material awareness. Uses custom Projectile collision channel.

AARPGDestructibleActor with GeometryCollectionComponent, accumulated damage threshold, impulse on break, break VFX/SFX, debris lifetime auto-cleanup, OnBroken delegate. Uses Destructible collision profile.
UPhysicsConstraintComponent used in AARPGPhysicsDoor (hinge door with kick-open, open/close toggle, SFX) and AARPGPhysicsLever (toggle lever with impulse and activation delegate).

UARPGTraceUtilities blueprint function library with Line/Sphere/SphereMulti/Box trace + SphereOverlap, all channel-filtered with debug draw and phys material return. AutoCreateRefTerm for ActorsToIgnore.

gotchas: UHT cannot parse TArray<AActor*>() as a default parameter — use AutoCreateRefTerm meta specifier and move the param before defaulted params
UPhysicalMaterial already has a SurfaceType member — custom subclasses must use a different name (e.g. GameSurfaceType)
FVector_NetQuantize (from HitResult.ImpactPoint) cannot be used in ternary with FVector — explicit FVector() cast needed
ChaosSolverEngine, GeometryCollectionEngine, FieldSystemEngine modules needed for Chaos destruction in UE 5.7

steps.label: Animation Locomotion
steps.description: AnimInstance, blend spaces, locomotion state machine

decisions.rationale: Comprehensive AnimInstance with Speed, Direction, IsInAir, SpeedRatio, lean, sprint blend, state machine enum, transition rules, upper-body blending, montage tracking. Death state now wired up via IsDead().
BS1D_Locomotion created via AnimAsset commandlet with Speed axis [0,600]. Sample anims must be assigned in editor.
5-state machine (Locomotion/Attacking/Dodging/HitReact/Death) fully defined in C++ with EARPGAnimState enum and transition rules. AnimBP graph must be built in editor.
RootMotionMode set to RootMotionFromMontagesOnly — locomotion uses velocity, attacks/dodges use root motion. bIsFullBodyMontage flag suppresses locomotion blending during montages.

gotchas: Virtual IsDead() on base character class enables AnimInstance death state without coupling to specific subclass bIsAlive flags

steps.label: Montages & Motion Warping
steps.description: Attack montages, anim notifies, motion warping, root motion

decisions.rationale: Full combo montage system via GA_MeleeAttack with sectioned montages, combo window events, input buffering, and section jumping. Asset commandlet creates montage shells.
All 5 notifies implemented: ComboWindow (toggle+GAS event), HitDetection (now with multi-point weapon tracing and frame-to-frame sweep), SpawnVFX (Niagara), PlaySound (attached/world).

MotionWarpingComponent on base character. GA_MeleeAttack now auto-acquires nearest enemy in forward cone (configurable radius/angle/stop distance) and sets warp target before each combo section. Clears on ability end. Re-acquires on combo advance.
Plugin infrastructure present (IKRig, PythonScriptPlugin enabled). Retargeting requires editor-side Python scripts which are asset-level, not C++ compilable. Pipeline ready for script creation.
Already verified: PoFEditor module with UAnimAssetCommandlet creates BS1D_Locomotion, AM_MeleeCombo, AM_Dodge_*, AM_HitReact, AM_Death in 0.06s headless.

gotchas: UE MotionWarping warp targets must be set BEFORE montage playback starts — the MotionWarping notify state reads them during the montage window
Frame-to-frame weapon sweep tracing (previous vs current socket positions) catches fast-swing hits that single-frame traces miss
Re-acquiring warp target on each combo section advance keeps magnetism tracking moving targets during multi-hit combos

steps.label: Gameplay Ability System Core
steps.description: Ability system component, attribute sets, gameplay effects, ability base class

decisions.rationale: Already comprehensive: Health, MaxHealth, Mana, MaxMana, Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Armor, AttackPower, CriticalChance, CriticalDamage, plus Progression (XP, Level) and Meta attributes (IncomingDamage, IncomingCrit, IncomingHeal). PreAttributeChange clamping and PostGameplayEffectExecute with death/hit-react events and damage number broadcasting.

GE_Damage (instant, execution calc), GE_Heal (instant, +25 HP), GE_Buff_Strength (duration 10s, +15 STR), GE_Regen_Health (periodic infinite, +5 HP/2s), GE_Regen_Mana (NEW: periodic infinite, +3 MP/2s), plus GE_InitAttributes, GE_ManaCost, GE_Stun, GE_DodgeCooldown, GE_DifficultyScaling, cooldown GEs for all abilities.

UARPGDamageExecution with full formula: BaseDamage + AttackPower*Scaling, crit roll, diminishing-returns armor reduction, invulnerability check, outputs via IncomingCrit + IncomingDamage meta attributes.

FARPGAttributeInitRow DataTable struct, GE_InitAttributes with SetByCaller per attribute, LevelScalingCurveTable support, XPRequirementsCurveTable, all wired through AARPGCharacterBase::InitializeAttributes() called from PossessedBy.

steps.label: GAS Abilities & Tags
steps.description: Concrete abilities, gameplay tags, gameplay cues, ability tasks

decisions.rationale: Comprehensive Ability/State/Damage/Event/Cooldown/Item/Input/Data/GameplayCue tag hierarchy with 110+ tags
UARPGGameplayAbility with mana cost, cooldown, auto-end, effect helpers, tag blocking, 7 concrete abilities
ARPGDamageExecution now factors armor (diminishing returns), crits, AND elemental resistances (Fire/Ice/Lightning) via dynamic asset tags
Added FireResistance/IceResistance/LightningResistance to attribute set, init data, init GE, and character init pipeline
All abilities now tag damage specs with Damage.Physical/Fire via AddDynamicAssetTag — enables resistance lookup and damage-type-aware VFX
10 GameplayCue tags defined, hit impact cues fire per damage type from PostGameplayEffectExecute, heal cues on IncomingHeal
Data Table + Curve Table pipeline with SetByCaller for all 17 attributes including resistances

gotchas: FGameplayEffectSpec::AddDynamicAssetTag() is the proper way to attach damage type metadata to a GE spec — the damage execution and PostGameplayEffectExecute can both read it via GetDynamicAssetTags()
UAbilitySystemComponent::ExecuteGameplayCue() fires a one-shot cue without needing a GE — useful for hit impact feedback from PostGameplayEffectExecute
Elemental resistances should be capped below 1.0 (0.9 cap) in PreAttributeChange to prevent full immunity

steps.label: 3D Models & Characters
steps.description: Import pipelines, procedural meshes, data tables

decisions.rationale: FARPGMeshImportConfig with full FBX settings (scale, pivot, normals, tangents, lightmaps, degenerates), UARPGMeshImportSettings data asset with per-category defaults
FARPGLODTier structs with screen size thresholds and reduction percentages, category-specific LOD tier presets (3 for props/chars, 4 for foliage, 2 for architecture/equipment)
EARPGCollisionPreset enum (None/SimpleBox/ConvexDecomposition/ComplexAsSimple/CustomConvex), per-category collision defaults, validation in MeshValidationCommandlet
Nanite toggle in import config, architecture/foliage default to Nanite enabled, validation skips LOD warnings for Nanite meshes
Foliage category preset with Nanite enabled, aggressive 4-tier LOD fallback, no lightmap UVs (dynamic lighting), covered by import config system
FARPGMeshRegistryRow (FTableRowBase) with display name, soft mesh refs, category, Nanite flag, LOD count, tri count, bounds, and full import config
AARPGProceduralMeshActor with GeneratePlatform (subdivisions), GenerateRamp, GenerateCylinder (caps), GenerateCustomMesh, proper normals/UVs/collision on all shapes
Character category in import config with LOD tiers, skeletal mesh field in registry, MeshValidationCommandlet validates SK_ naming, bone count, LODs, physics asset, materials

gotchas: UStaticMesh::NaniteSettings is deprecated in 5.7 — use IsNaniteEnabled() and GetNaniteSettings() accessor functions instead

steps.label: Audio & Music
steps.description: Spatial audio painter, zone reverb, emitters, sound manager codegen

decisions.rationale: UGameInstanceSubsystem with per-category volume control (Master/Music/SFX/Ambient/UI/Voice), sound pooling (32 max, recycle timer), 2D/3D/attached playback, default concurrency settings
AARPGAmbientSoundActor with looping/random-interval modes, configurable attenuation radius, occlusion, pitch variation, enable/disable control

UARPGMusicManager subsystem with 7 music states (Exploration/Combat/Boss/Stealth/Menu/Cinematic), dual-track crossfading, combat intensity scaling, track registration, volume control, state change delegates

AARPGAudioVolume with 8 reverb presets (SmallRoom/LargeHall/Cave/Forest/Underwater/Cathedral/Arena/Custom), box overlap detection, interior ambient sounds with fade in/out, configurable priority and fade time
UARPGMetaSoundInterface component wrapping MetaSound sources with typed parameter bindings (float/int/bool), trigger support, auto-play, fade out, default parameter application
UARPGSoundConcurrencyConfig data asset with 6 category presets (Weapon/Footstep/Ambient/UI/Ability/Impact), configurable max count, resolution rules, volume scaling

gotchas: UAudioComponent::bEnableDefaultMultichannelEvaluation does not exist in UE 5.7 — removed without replacement
EMaxConcurrentResolutionRule is a namespace enum in UE 5.7, not an enum class — must use TEnumAsByte<EMaxConcurrentResolutionRule::Type> for UPROPERTY
UAudioComponent::SetBoolParameter() exists natively in UE 5.7 — no need for int workaround

steps.label: Character Foundation
steps.description: Base character class, game mode, player controller, and core movement (walk, sprint)

decisions.rationale: Abstract base with movement, sprint, dodge, stamina, camera, GAS, motion warping, death, animation helpers. Added IsDead() check to CanMove().
Health/mana/XP/leveling, interaction, death/respawn, ability loadout, cursor aim, attribute allocation, perception stimuli, overhead widget.
Camera-relative movement with orient-to-movement, diagonal normalization, speed-dependent rotation rate, acceleration curves.
Hold-to-sprint with speed interp, stamina drain/regen with delay, FOV shift, arm length offset, auto-stop/re-engage logic.
4-directional dodge with custom movement mode, quadratic ease-out, wall sliding, invulnerability (timer or anim-notify driven), cancel window, montage support, cooldown.

gotchas: CanMove() should always check IsDead() as first gate to prevent dead characters from processing movement input — especially important for enemy AI that may call AddMovementInput after death

steps.label: Camera & Input System
steps.description: Camera setup, input mapping context, enhanced input actions

decisions.rationale: Full Enhanced Input with 16 actions, KB/M + gamepad bindings, key rebinding with save/load, device detection, context stacking, pause menu, input mode management

IA_Move, IA_Look, IA_Interact, IA_PrimaryAttack, IA_Dodge, IA_Sprint, IA_Zoom, IA_RotateCamera (L/R/Analog), IA_UsePotion, IA_Pause, IA_AbilitySlot1-4 — all with proper modifiers (swizzle, negate, deadzone)
Spring arm with configurable pitch, zoom (min/max with smooth interp), Q/E + analog rotation, camera lag, collision, sprint FOV/arm offset, movement sway (roll+pitch)

steps.label: Input Handling
steps.description: Enhanced Input, rebinding, gamepad

decisions.rationale: 16 input actions with correct value types covering all gameplay needs
Full KB/M and gamepad bindings with proper modifiers (swizzle, negate, deadzone)
Runtime rebinding with save/load persistence, reset to defaults, chained remap simplification, and NEW conflict detection
Full gamepad layout (sticks, face buttons, shoulders, triggers, d-pad, start), configurable deadzones
Game/UI/GameAndUI modes. Fixed cursor bug where device switch would hide cursor during UI mode
IMC push/pop stacking with priority. Works for vehicle/swimming/menu overlays

steps.label: Physics & Collision
steps.description: Profiles, materials, projectiles, destruction

decisions.rationale: 4 custom channels (Projectile, Interactable, WeaponTrace, Destructible) with full DefaultEngine.ini profiles. Added missing WeaponTrace profile name constant.
Extended UPhysicalMaterial with game surface types, impact VFX/SFX, footstep sounds, and scale multiplier. 10 surface types.
Full-featured projectile with homing, bouncing, AoE with distance falloff, GAS damage integration with dynamic asset tags, surface-aware impact FX.
GeometryCollection-based destructibles with damage accumulation, break VFX/SFX, debris cleanup, events. Added loot drop system with eject impulse and spawn radius.
Physics door (hinge + kick), lever (toggle hinge), and new constraint preset data asset with 5 types (Hinge, BallAndSocket, Prismatic, Weld, Custom) for ragdoll and generic joints.
Line/sphere/box/capsule traces with channel filtering, debug draw, multi-trace, sphere overlap, and phys material helper. Added capsule trace.

steps.label: Animation Locomotion
steps.description: AnimInstance, blend spaces, locomotion state machine

decisions.rationale: 30+ exposed variables: locomotion (Speed, Direction, IsInAir, SpeedRatio, LeanAngle, TurnRate, RunSpeedNormalized, SprintBlendAlpha, StaminaRatio), combat state (bIsAttacking, bIsDodging, bIsHitReacting, bIsDead), EARPGAnimState enum with priority-based state machine, transition interrupt rules, upper-body blending with cached pose documentation, montage tracking

AnimAssetCommandlet creates both BS1D_Locomotion (SpeedRatio 0-1 or absolute speed) and BS_Locomotion 2D (Direction x Speed) via FProperty reflection on protected BlendParameters. Configurable via -SpeedMax and -UseSpeedRatio params

EARPGAnimState enum (Locomotion/Attacking/Dodging/HitReact/Death) computed with priority ordering. Comprehensive transition rules documented in header comments with interrupt support (dodge cancel, attack recovery, hit-react pulse)

RootMotionMode set to RootMotionFromMontagesOnly in constructor — locomotion uses velocity-driven movement, attacks/dodges use root motion. bIsFullBodyMontage flag for suppressing locomotion blending during montages

steps.label: Montages & Motion Warping
steps.description: Attack montages, anim notifies, motion warping, root motion

decisions.rationale: AM_MeleeCombo (3 sections linked), AM_HeavyCombo (2 sections), dodge/hitreact/death shells all created by AnimAssetCommandlet. Added directional hit react montage shells (Front/Back/Left/Right) and heavy combo montage.

All 5 notifies implemented: ComboWindow (instant), ComboWindow (state — new), HitDetection (state with multi-point sweep + frame-to-frame tracing), SpawnVFX (Niagara), PlaySound. Fixed ComboWindow editor color bug (was set once in ctor, now dynamic via GetEditorColor).

MotionWarpingComponent on character base, GA_MeleeAttack auto-acquires nearest enemy in configurable forward cone, re-acquires per combo section advance, clears on end. Stop distance prevents warping into targets.

MixamoImportCommandlet delegates to Python pipeline (mixamo_pipeline module) for FBX import with bone prefix stripping, IK Retargeter fuzzy chain mapping, and root motion extraction. Python module is external dependency.

AnimAssetCommandlet creates BS1D, BS2D, AM_MeleeCombo, AM_HeavyCombo, 4x AM_Dodge, AM_HitReact, 4x AM_HitReact directional, AM_Death, CT_XPRequirements. 14 assets total. Sections linked sequentially for combos.

gotchas: UAnimNotify::NotifyColor set in constructor won't update when properties change in editor — override GetEditorColor() instead for dynamic color based on property values
AnimNotifyState is more designer-friendly than two bookend instant notifies for window-based concepts (combo window, invulnerability frames) — the duration bar is intuitive
Montage_GetCurrentSection() returns the active section name — useful for section-aware AnimBP transitions and per-section logic

steps.label: Gameplay Ability System Core
steps.description: Ability system component, attribute sets, gameplay effects, ability base class

decisions.rationale: Health/Mana/Str/Dex/Int/Armor/AP/CritChance/CritDamage plus elemental resistances, progression, and 3 meta attributes. Full PreAttributeChange clamping and PostGameplayEffectExecute with damage numbers, GameplayCues, death/hitreact events.

GE_Damage (execution-based), GE_Heal (fixed: now routes through IncomingHeal meta for proper GameplayCue pipeline), GE_Buff_Strength (duration), GE_Regen_Health/Mana (periodic infinite), GE_Stun, GE_ManaCost, GE_InitAttributes, GE_DodgeCooldown, GE_AwardXP, GE_DifficultyScaling, plus 4 ability cooldown GEs.
Full formula: BaseDamage + AP*Scaling, crit roll, diminishing-returns armor reduction, elemental resistance lookup from dynamic asset tags, invulnerability check. Outputs via meta attributes.

FARPGAttributeInitRow data table struct, per-level curve table scaling, GE_InitAttributes with SetByCaller for all 17 attributes, XP requirements curve table. InitializeAttributes called from PossessedBy.

gotchas: GE_Heal should modify IncomingHeal meta attribute (not Health directly) to go through the full heal pipeline with GameplayCue support in PostGameplayEffectExecute

steps.label: GAS Abilities & Tags
steps.description: Concrete abilities, gameplay tags, gameplay cues, ability tasks

decisions.rationale: 130+ tags across Ability.*, State.*, Damage.*, Input.*, Cooldown.*, Event.*, Data.*, Item.*, GameplayCue.* namespaces. Added 6 new tags: Ability.UsePotion, Ability.HitReact, Ability.Enemy.Melee/Ranged/Charge
UARPGGameplayAbility with mana cost, cooldown tag, auto-end, helper methods (ApplyEffectToTarget/Self, GetARPGCharacter/ASC/AttributeSet), cost check/apply overrides, UI accessors

Full damage formula: BaseDamage + AttackPower*Scaling, crit roll, diminishing armor reduction, elemental resistance lookup from dynamic asset tags, invulnerability check, outputs to IncomingDamage/IncomingCrit meta attributes
GE_InitAttributes with 17 SetByCaller modifiers, FARPGAttributeInitRow data table struct, curve table row name constants for per-level scaling

9 player/shared abilities: MeleeAttack (combo chain + motion warping), Fireball (projectile AoE), GroundSlam (AoE stun), DashStrike (sweep damage), WarCry (self-buff), Dodge (4-directional with stamina), Death (event-triggered), HitReact (NEW), UsePotion (NEW)
3 enemy abilities: EnemyMelee (front-arc overlap), EnemyRanged (BB-targeted projectile), EnemyCharge (motion warp AoE). Fixed tag collision — each now uses distinct Ability.Enemy.* tags

14 GE classes: Damage (execution-based), Heal (IncomingHeal meta), Stun (duration+tag), Buff_WarCry (+20AP/+15Armor/15s), ManaCost (SetByCaller), 5 cooldowns, 2 regen (Health/Mana periodic), InitAttributes, DifficultyScaling
Full component with learn/upgrade via skill points, level requirements, rank progression, data table driven, delegates for UI

gotchas: Enemy abilities should use distinct Ability.Enemy.* tags rather than reusing player ability tags (e.g. Ability.Melee.LightAttack) to prevent tag-based filtering collisions between player and enemy ability sets
GA_HitReact should block on State.Attacking/Invulnerable/Dashing to avoid interrupting active player actions — hit react is a lower priority response
GA_UsePotion is fire-and-forget (CommitAbility + ApplyEffectToSelf + EndAbility) — no montage needed, cooldown gates usage

steps.label: 3D Models & Characters
steps.description: Import pipelines, procedural meshes, data tables

decisions.rationale: FARPGMeshImportConfig with per-category defaults (scale, lightmap UVs, normals, tangents, degenerate removal). UARPGMeshImportSettings data asset with InitializeDefaults for all 6 categories.
FARPGLODTier with screen size thresholds and reduction percentages. Category-appropriate LOD tiers (Foliage=4, Prop/Character=3, Arch/Equipment=2, VFX=0).
EARPGCollisionPreset with 5 presets (None, SimpleBox, ConvexDecomposition, ComplexAsSimple, CustomConvex). Per-category collision defaults matching gameplay needs.
bEnableNanite in import config, enabled by default for Architecture and Foliage. Validation commandlet checks Nanite status and LOD fallback.
Added FARPGNaniteFoliageConfig with WPO wind, fallback LOD, cull distance, density scale. UARPGNaniteFoliageSettings data asset with 4 presets (Tree, Bush, Grass, Rock).
FARPGMeshRegistryRow with display name, soft mesh refs (static+skeletal), category, Nanite flag, LOD count, tri count, bounds, and full import config.
AARPGProceduralMeshActor with Platform (subdivided), Wall, Ramp, Cylinder, and CustomMesh generation. All with collision, material support, and proper normals/UVs.

FARPGSkeletalMeshImportConfig with morph targets, physics asset, bone influence, max bones per vertex, target skeleton, LOD tiers. UMixamoImportCommandlet for headless Mixamo FBX pipeline with retarget and root motion extraction.

steps.label: Audio & Music
steps.description: Spatial audio painter, zone reverb, emitters, sound manager codegen

decisions.rationale: Pooling, per-category volume with master multiplier, volume persistence via GConfig (save/load to GameUserSettings.ini)
Looping, random-interval, and now fully implemented TimeOfDay mode with configurable active hours, midnight-wrapping, and fade transitions
Fixed critical bug: audio components now lazily created with world registration (EnsureAudioComponentsReady) so they actually produce sound. Crossfade, combat intensity, state machine all working
Fixed reverb: now creates real UReverbEffect and calls ActivateReverbEffect/DeactivateReverbEffect on the audio device. Supports 8 presets + custom. Added overlap counting for correct deactivation
Typed parameter interface with float/int/bool/trigger, auto-play, fade out. Clean component wrapper for MetaSound sources
Data asset with 6 category presets (weapon, footstep, ambient, UI, ability, impact). Configurable max count, resolution rule, volume scaling

gotchas: UAudioComponent created via NewObject on a subsystem (no world) won't produce sound — must RegisterComponentWithWorld after a world exists, or create lazily
FAudioDeviceHandle from World->GetAudioDevice() provides ActivateReverbEffect/DeactivateReverbEffect for runtime reverb control without AReverbVolume actors
GConfig->SetFloat/GetFloat with GGameUserSettingsIni is the lightweight way to persist audio settings without a full SaveGame system

steps.label: UI / HUD
steps.description: UMG menus, HUD, inventory, settings

decisions.rationale: New Game/Continue/Settings/Quit with save detection, embedded settings page, version text
AHUD subclass managing all widget lifecycle, show/hide/toggle API, input mode transitions, notification routing. ARPGHUDWidget has GAS-bound health/mana bars with smooth interp and low-health pulse
6x5 grid with drag-drop, 9 equipment slots, rarity borders, hover tooltips with affix display. Already production quality
3 tabs (Graphics/Audio/Controls) with resolution detection, quality presets, VSync, frame limit, volume sliders, mouse sensitivity, keybinding display
Elemental color coding, crit display, world-to-screen projection, fade/float animation, pooling with max limit, global GAS delegate subscription
Progress bar, status text, randomized tips, fade-in/out. Ready for async level load integration

Fade state machines in EnemyHealthBar, LoadingScreen, NotificationWidget; smooth bar interpolation in HUD; damage number float/fade; cooldown sweep material. Animation is per-widget rather than a shared utility, which is appropriate for UMG

gotchas: UDragDropOperation already has a Payload member — do not re-declare it in subclasses or UHT will error on shadowing

steps.label: Combat — Melee & Combos
steps.description: Melee attack ability, combo system, hit detection, GAS damage application

decisions.rationale: GA_MeleeAttack fully implemented with montage-driven combos, motion warping magnetism, SetByCaller damage, per-section damage multipliers. Fixed null deref on GetHitResult() in OnMeleeHit.

Full combo chain: input buffering, combo window open/close via gameplay events, montage section advancement, timeout reset. AnimNotifyState_ComboWindow + instant AnimNotify_ComboWindow both available.
AnimNotifyState_HitDetection with multi-point base-to-tip tracing, frame-to-frame sweep for fast swings, TSet dedup, debug visualization, configurable trace channel/radius/socket names.

Full pipeline: GE_Damage → ARPGDamageExecution (AttackPower scaling, crit roll, armor diminishing returns, elemental resistance with 0.9 cap) → IncomingDamage meta attr → PostGameplayEffectExecute (health reduction, damage numbers, gameplay cues, death/hit-react events).
GA_Dodge with directional montage selection, stamina cost, State.Invulnerable via ActivationOwnedTags, GE_DodgeCooldown, root motion. Full delegate system for VFX/SFX hooks.

GA_Death event-triggered by Event.Death, cancels all abilities, disables movement/collision, plays death montage, optional ragdoll, player input disable + respawn, enemy destroy timer. State.Dead persists until respawn.

gotchas: GA_HitReact must set/clear bIsHitReacting on the character so CanMove() properly gates movement during hit reactions — without this, the character can walk freely while playing a hit-react montage
FGameplayAbilityTargetData::GetHitResult() can return nullptr even when TargetData.Num() > 0 — always null-check before dereferencing

steps.label: Combat — Feedback & Death
steps.description: Hit reactions, death flow, combat feedback, dodge ability (GAS)

decisions.rationale: GA_HitReact: event-triggered via Event.HitReact, plays montage, sets bIsHitReacting to gate movement, blocked by State.Attacking/Invulnerable/Dashing. Full pipeline from PostGameplayEffectExecute through GAS events.

GA_Dodge: directional 4-way montages, stamina cost, cooldown via GE_DodgeCooldown, State.Invulnerable via ActivationOwnedTags, rotation snap, root motion, cancel window, anim-notify-driven invuln timing.

GA_Death: event-triggered via Event.Death, State.Dead persists, cancels all abilities, disables movement/collision, plays death montage, ragdoll, player respawn timer, enemy destroy timer + XP reward. Now also handles test dummy.

CombatFeedbackComponent: camera shake (light/heavy), hitstop (per-actor CustomTimeDilation with restore), Niagara VFX at impact, damage-type-aware SFX with pitch variation, crit layering. Added controller vibration with configurable intensity for normal/crit hits.
DamageNumberManagerComponent + DamageNumberWidget: global delegate subscription, world-to-screen projection, float + fade animation, damage type colors, crit scaling, max active limit.

New AARPGCombatTestDummy: static target with GAS health, floating health bar, GA_HitReact + GA_Death, auto-respawn with full state reset (ragdoll undo, attribute re-init, collision restore), invulnerability toggle.

gotchas: APlayerController::PlayDynamicForceFeedback() is the simplest way to trigger gamepad vibration — no ForceFeedbackEffect asset needed, just intensity + duration + channel booleans
Test dummy respawn requires cancelling all GAS abilities first (to clear State.Dead from ActivationOwnedTags), then re-granting abilities and re-initializing attributes

steps.label: Enemy AI — Controllers & Perception
steps.description: AI controller, enemy character, AI perception, behavior tree basics

decisions.rationale: BT/BB/perception. Added target validation (filters dead/enemy actors), ClearTarget(), HomeLocation tracking, leash distance, aggro timeout config.
Already production quality — archetype system, health bar, XP scaling, death/BT-stop, ability granting. No changes needed.
Sight + damage senses. Fixed OnPerceptionUpdated to validate targets (IsValidTarget rejects dead chars and other enemies).

Fixed critical NodeMemory bugs in 3 tasks (ChargeToTarget, ExecuteAttackAbility, MaintainDistance). Added BTService_UpdateCombatState, BTDecorator_HealthBelow, BTTask_ReturnToHome, IsInAttackRange reads from BB.

7 EQS components: PatrolPoints, AttackPositions, CoverPositions generators + FlankAngle, PathExists, LineOfSight, ElevationAdvantage tests + TargetActor context. All pre-existing and production quality.

gotchas: BT task nodes are shared singletons by default (bCreateNodeInstance=false) — per-instance state MUST use GetInstanceMemorySize()/NodeMemory, not member variables. Storing FDelegateHandle or float state as member vars corrupts when multiple enemies share the same BT.
FPathFollowingRequestResult is forward-declared in AIController.h — include Navigation/PathFollowingComponent.h to use it (known UE 5.7 gotcha)
WaitForMessage(OwnerComp, UBrainComponent::AIMessage_MoveFinished) is the cleanest way to wait for MoveTo completion in BT tasks without manual delegate plumbing

steps.label: Enemy AI — EQS, Archetypes & Spawning
steps.description: EQS queries, enemy archetypes, enemy abilities, spawn system

decisions.rationale: 6 EQS classes: PatrolPoints generator, AttackPositions ring generator (with inner ring), CoverPositions geometry-traced generator, FlankAngle/PathExists/LineOfSight/ElevationAdvantage tests, TargetActor context. Production-quality with nav mesh projection.

3 archetypes (MeleeGrunt/RangedCaster/Brute) with full config: AttackRange, PreferredCombatDistance, RetreatDistance, AttackCooldown, PrimaryAbilityTag, ChargeSpeedMultiplier. BTDecorator_CheckArchetype for BT branching. Archetype defaults auto-applied on possess and written to BB.

3 enemy abilities: GA_EnemyMeleeAttack (front-arc overlap + montage), GA_EnemyRangedAttack (projectile spawning from BB target), GA_EnemyChargeAttack (motion warping + AoE). Fixed critical bug: BTTask_ExecuteAttackAbility was responding to ALL ability ends, not just the activated one.

EnemySpawnPoint (single-point with respawn, difficulty scaling, nav-projected jitter) + SpawnVolume (wave spawning with trigger overlap, difficulty scaling from GameInstance). Added kill-based wave advancement option and per-wave difficulty escalation.

gotchas: BTService nodes are also shared singletons like BTTask nodes — NoLOSTimer as a member variable corrupts when multiple enemies share the same BT. Must use GetInstanceMemorySize()/NodeMemory.
ASC->OnAbilityEnded fires for ALL abilities ending on that ASC, not just the one you activated — must filter by FGameplayAbilitySpecHandle to avoid premature BT task completion
WaitForMessage(OwnerComp, UBrainComponent::AIMessage_MoveFinished) is safer than lambda-based OnRequestFinished delegates in BT tasks — avoids dangling reference captures on OwnerComp

steps.label: AI / NPC Behavior
steps.description: Behavior trees, EQS, perception, combat AI, scenario-based testing sandbox

decisions.rationale: Comprehensive AAIController with blackboard, BT, perception (sight+damage+hearing), leash/aggro timeout, target validation

11 custom BT nodes: 5 tasks (ExecuteAttackAbility, MaintainDistance, FindPatrolPoint, FaceTarget, ReturnToHome, ChargeToTarget), 2 services (UpdateCombatState, SquadCoordination), 4 decorators (HasTarget, IsInAttackRange, HealthBelow, CheckArchetype). All use proper NodeMemory for shared singleton safety
Added hearing sense (UAISenseConfig_Hearing) alongside existing sight and damage. Hearing only aggros when no current target, doesn't set LOS. Configurable HearingRange
6 EQS classes: 3 generators (PatrolPoints, AttackPositions, CoverPositions), 4 tests (FlankAngle, PathExists, LineOfSight, ElevationAdvantage), 1 context (TargetActor)

New UARPGSquadManager with attack token system (limits simultaneous attackers), flanking position assignment (even angular spread), focus fire coordination, and coordinated retreat signaling. BTService_SquadCoordination integrates with BT

New FGameplayDebuggerCategory_ARPG registered as ARPG_AI category. Displays AI state, archetype, health, target/LOS/distance, attack range/cooldown, active BT task, and GAS tags with color-coded output

3 State Tree nodes: FSTTask_ActivateAbility (fire-and-forget ability activation by tag), FSTCondition_HasTarget (target existence + alive check), FSTEvaluator_CombatData (ticking evaluator exposing target/distance/LOS/health/range as bindable output properties). StateTree + GameplayStateTree plugins enabled

gotchas: GameplayDebugger module in UE 5.7 is at Source/Runtime/GameplayDebugger, module name is 'GameplayDebugger'
StateTree plugin modules: 'StateTreeModule' (runtime) and 'GameplayStateTreeModule' (AI integration)
State Tree tasks/conditions/evaluators are USTRUCT-based (not UCLASS) with separate instance data structs
FGameplayDebuggerCategory::SetDataPackReplication<T> requires T to have a Serialize(FArchive&) method
UAISenseConfig_Hearing uses HearingRange (not SightRadius-style naming)

steps.label: Materials — Core
steps.description: Master material, dynamic instances, MPC, material functions

decisions.rationale: UARPGMasterMaterialConfig data asset with scalar/vector/texture parameter definitions and CreateConfiguredInstance() for stamping MIDs with defaults
UARPGDynamicMaterialManager component with damage flash, dissolve, highlight, freeze/burn effects; auto-creates MIDs on BeginPlay, tick-driven with auto-disable when idle
UARPGMaterialParameterCollectionManager world subsystem driving GlobalTime, WindDirection/Strength, GlobalTint, and Wetness via UKismetMaterialLibrary each tick
UARPGEnvironmentMaterialSet data asset with FARPGSurfaceMaterialDef (PBR textures, scalar overrides, detail texture, macro variation) and CreateSurfaceInstance()/FindSurfaceByName()

UARPGMaterialFunctionLibrary with UV ops (world-aligned, triplanar, rotate, pan, tile), noise (value, fBm, Voronoi), blending (height, angle, distance fade), and convenience helpers (batch params, CreateDynamicMaterialsForMesh, LerpScalarParameter)

steps.label: Materials — Advanced
steps.description: Post-process, HLSL custom nodes, layer system, Substrate

decisions.rationale: PostProcessChain component with blendable management, per-effect enable/disable, blend weight animation, scalar/vector parameter overrides. Attaches to PostProcessComponent or CameraComponent.

UARPGMaterialLayer data asset with full PBR properties, UARPGMaterialLayerStack with base+N blend layers, 4 blend modes (linear, height, angle, vertex color), runtime blend weight control. Indexed parameter naming convention for master material compatibility.

12 HLSL snippets: dissolve edge, directional dissolve, cel shading, rim outline, hatching, caustics, hex grid, shield ripple, radial blur, chromatic aberration, vignette, gradient noise 3D, flow mapping. Ready for Custom node paste in material editor.

World subsystem with shared MID pooling, distance-based material LOD (3 default tiers), quality tier management, material complexity profiling with instruction/texture/feature estimation, automatic stale entry cleanup.

gotchas: UMaterialInterface::GetUsedTextures() with quality/featurelevel params is deprecated in 5.7 — use the parameterless overload
TArray<T*>::Sort() with const T* lambda fails due to TDereferenceWrapper — use Algo::Sort() with Algo/Sort.h include

steps.label: Animations
steps.description: AnimBP, locomotion states, montages, notifies

decisions.rationale: UARPGAnimInstance with full state machine (5 states), locomotion proxy vars, lean/sprint blend, montage tracking, root motion, upper-body blending. Production-quality.
AnimAssetCommandlet creates BS1D_Locomotion (SpeedRatio or absolute) and BS_Locomotion (2D Direction x Speed) via FProperty reflection on protected BlendParameters.
EARPGAnimState enum (Locomotion/Attacking/Dodging/HitReact/Death) with priority-based ComputeAnimState(), transition interrupt rules, and state time tracking.
Commandlet creates AM_MeleeCombo (3 sections linked), AM_HeavyCombo (2 sections), AM_Dodge_* (4 dirs), AM_HitReact (5 directional variants), AM_Death. Section tracking in AnimInstance.

10 notify classes: ComboWindow (instant+state), HitDetection (multi-point sweep), SpawnVFX (Niagara), PlaySound, CameraShake, FootstepEffect (surface-aware), InvulnerabilityFrames, GameplayEvent (new), RootMotionScale (new).
MotionWarping plugin dependency in Build.cs. Warp target setup handled by GA_MeleeAttack. AnimInstance tracks root motion velocity/direction.
RootMotionFromMontagesOnly mode. bIsUsingRootMotion, bIsFullBodyMontage, RootMotionSpeed/Direction tracked per frame. New AnimNotifyState_RootMotionScale for per-window scaling.
MixamoImportCommandlet with full Python pipeline: FBX import, IK Rig/Retargeter creation, batch retargeting, root motion extraction. IKRig+IKRigDeveloper module deps in PoFEditor.
ARPGMotionMatchingConfig data asset with FMotionMatchEntry catalog, cost weights, trajectory params, tag-based filtering. Ready for PoseSearch plugin integration.

ARPGMorphTargetController component: named profile presets, smooth blending, additive stacking, health-driven damage morphs (fixed: now reads Health/MaxHealth from GAS AttributeSet instead of stamina placeholder).
AnimAssetCommandlet (blend spaces + montages + XP curve), MixamoImportCommandlet (Python retarget pipeline), MeshValidationCommandlet (mesh quality checks). All headless-compatible.

steps.label: Item Definitions & Inventory
steps.description: Item definition, item instance, inventory component

decisions.rationale: Already comprehensive PrimaryDataAsset with name, icon, type, rarity, effects, tags, affix pool, equipment slots. Added Weight and RequiredLevel properties.
Full runtime object with definition ref, stack count, item level, affixes, unique ID, replication, serialization, affix name decoration. No changes needed.

Already had Add/Remove/Move/Sort/Find/Equip/Unequip/UseItem/Save/Load with GAS integration. Added SplitStack, MergeStacks, RemoveItemByDefinition, FindAllItemsByDefinition, HasItem, GetAllItems, GetAllEquippedItems, GetTotalWeight, WouldExceedWeight, MaxCarryWeight, and auto-merge on MoveItem for same-definition stacks.

steps.label: Equipment & Consumables
steps.description: Equipment slots, equip/unequip GAS flow, consumables, affix system

decisions.rationale: EEquipmentSlot enum (Weapon, OffHand, Helm, Chest, Gloves, Boots, Ring1, Ring2, Amulet) with TMap<EEquipmentSlot, UARPGItemInstance*> for equipped items. Added IsSlotOccupied() convenience query.
ApplyEquipEffect/RemoveEquipEffect applies base OnEquipEffect GE + per-affix GEs with SetByCaller magnitude. Swap-on-equip returns old item to inventory. Added RequiredLevel enforcement gate.
UseItem applies OnUseEffect via ASC, applies GE_PotionCooldown for cooldown gating, decrements stack and removes on empty. UseFirstConsumable for quick-use. Added RequiredLevel enforcement.

5 rarity tiers with weighted random affix rolling, tier-gating (MinRarity), item-level scaling, reroll support. Added shared GetRarityColor() and GetRarityDisplayName() utilities on UARPGItemDefinition.
Full suite: AddItem (auto-stack), RemoveItem, MoveItem (auto-merge), SplitStack, MergeStacks, Sort, RemoveByDefinition, FindAll, HasItem, weight encumbrance, save/load with GE handle restoration.

gotchas: UHT parameter shadowing: UFUNCTION params cannot share names with UPROPERTY members in the same UCLASS — use InRarity instead of Rarity to avoid 'shadowing is not allowed' UHT error

steps.label: Loot Tables & Selection
steps.description: Loot table data, weighted random selection, world items

decisions.rationale: Improved existing loot table with weighted rarity distribution (exponentially decreasing weights: 100/50/20/5/1) and RarityBonusMultiplier parameter for boss/archetype scaling
RollWeightedRarity static method with configurable bonus multiplier that boosts higher tier weights via power scaling
Dropped item actor with mesh from definition, rarity-colored point light (Uncommon+), vertical bob + rotation animation, Interactable tag for interaction system

UARPGLootDropComponent auto-binds to OnEnemyDeath, supports configurable NumRolls and RarityBonusMultiplier. Built into AARPGEnemyCharacter with per-archetype defaults (Brute: 2 rolls, 2x rarity bonus)
Player PerformInteraction() now handles WorldItem tag — calls TryPickup with weight check, partial pickup support, and inventory-full handling
AARPGLootChest with lid open animation (pitch rotation), configurable loot table + rolls, optional respawn timer, Interactable+Chest tags for interaction system

steps.label: Loot Drops & Feedback
steps.description: Drop on death, pickup, visual feedback, chest/container actors

decisions.rationale: Added: RolledRarity on instances (loot table now stores rolled rarity), rarity-scaled mesh size, rarity-scaled light radius, faster spin/bob for epic+ items, spawn launch arc physics, auto-pickup for common items on overlap, despawn timer with blink warning, pickup sound hook, pickup notification delegates (per-actor + static global for HUD), GetEffectiveRarity() helper

gotchas: FOnItemPickedUpStatic (static multicast delegate) allows HUD to bind once globally without per-actor references — useful for pickup notification feeds

steps.label: HUD & GAS Bindings
steps.description: Main HUD widget, GAS attribute binding, enemy health bars, ability cooldowns

decisions.rationale: Health/mana bars with smooth interpolation and low-health pulse. Added stamina bar, XP bar with smooth fill, level display, and minimap placeholder border.

Real-time Health/MaxHealth/Mana/MaxMana via GetGameplayAttributeValueChangeDelegate. Stamina/XP polled from player character. Critical fix: ARPGHUD::BeginPlay now auto-binds all widgets to player ASC — previously widgets were created but never bound.
Floating UWidgetComponent with fade-in on damage, fade-out after delay, death fade. Added level-colored text (red=danger, white=normal, gray=trivial) based on player/enemy level difference.
4 ability slots with icon, cooldown sweep overlay, mana cost, keybind label. Cooldowns polled from ASC each tick. Auto-refreshes from loadout on OnLoadoutChanged delegate.

steps.label: UI Screens
steps.description: Inventory screen, character stats, floating damage numbers, pause/settings

decisions.rationale: Grid inventory with drag-drop, rarity borders, tooltips, equipment panel. Fixed: bound to InventoryComponent from HUD, added right-click equip/use on inventory slots, right-click unequip on equipment slots, added I key toggle input action.
All GAS attributes displayed with base+bonus, damage reduction from armor, live updates via attribute change delegates. Fixed: bound to ASC from HUD, added C key toggle input action.

World-to-screen projected, colored by damage type (physical/fire/ice/lightning/heal), crit variant with larger font and CRIT! prefix. Fixed: positioning (SetPositionInViewport instead of SetRenderTranslation), added crit scale punch animation (1.5x→1.0x).

Pause menu with Resume/Settings/Save/Quit. Settings has Graphics/Audio/Controls tabs with resolution, quality, VSync, fullscreen, frame limit, volume sliders, mouse sensitivity, invert-Y, keybinding display. Added inventory/stats key entries to keybinding display.

gotchas: SetRenderTranslation offsets from the widget's layout anchor — for world-projected damage numbers use SetPositionInViewport with screen coordinates instead
UMG widgets created in HUD::BeginPlay but never bound to data sources are inert — must call BindToInventory/BindToAbilitySystem from BindWidgetsToPlayer

steps.label: Dialogue & NPC Interaction
steps.description: Dialogue data assets, branching conversations, NPC interaction

decisions.rationale: UARPGDialogueTree (UPrimaryDataAsset) with nodes, choices, conditions (quest/level/tag/item), actions (give quest/complete/XP/tags), speaker portraits, one-shot support, validation

UARPGDialogueComponent drives full conversation state: priority-ordered tree selection, condition evaluation (AND logic with invert), action execution on node entry and choice selection, auto-advance for choiceless nodes
UDialogueWidget with speaker portrait, name (gold), body text, dynamic choice buttons, continue button. Auto-binds to dialogue component events. Programmatic UMG layout.

UARPGQuestSubsystem (GameInstanceSubsystem) with full lifecycle: accept/complete/fail/abandon, objective progress tracking, ReportEvent for kill/collect/location/talk auto-matching, auto-complete, prerequisites, save/restore, delegates for UI
UQuestTrackerWidget shows active quests with objective progress, auto-refreshes on quest/objective events, max 3 displayed with overflow indicator
PerformInteraction auto-detects UARPGDialogueComponent on target actors, starts dialogue, and shows HUD widget. Any actor with the component becomes an NPC.

gotchas: UUserWidget has no SetRootWidget() method — use WidgetTree->RootWidget = widget to set programmatic root
UFUNCTION cannot return const USTRUCT* — use a copy-out pattern (bool GetFoo(FName ID, FStruct& Out) const) for Blueprint exposure
UARPGInventoryComponent methods take UARPGItemDefinition* not FName — dialogue item actions need Blueprint wiring or asset manager lookup

steps.label: Quest System
steps.description: Quest tracker, objectives, quest log UI

decisions.rationale: Full lifecycle with objective tracking, pinning, save/load, rewards, prerequisite chains. Fixed: OnQuestFailed now bound in tracker widget, pinned quest persisted in save/load.
Kill/Collect/Location/TalkTo/Manual + new Escort/Defend types. ReportEvent safely handles TMap mutation. Category-sorted quest log with section headers.
Active/Completed/Failed tabs, category headers, detail panel with objectives/rewards, pin/abandon buttons. Now sorts quests by category with visual separators.

steps.label: XP & Leveling
steps.description: XP/level attributes, XP curve, XP on kill, level-up detection

decisions.rationale: CurrentXP, XPToNextLevel, CharacterLevel already in AttributeSet with proper clamping (level 1-50). Added IncomingXP meta attribute for clean XP pipeline.
XPRequirementsCurveTable on CharacterBase + CalculateXPForLevel power curve (100 * level^1.5). Data-driven via curve table with code fallback.

decisions.decision: Implemented XP award on enemy death
decisions.rationale: Fixed critical bug: GE_AwardXP now targets IncomingXP meta attribute (was targeting CurrentXP directly, bypassing level-up detection). Enemy death → GE_AwardXP → PostGameplayEffectExecute → AddExperience → level-up. Level-scaled XP with archetype bonuses.

Fixed critical disconnect: AddExperience now syncs GAS CurrentXP/CharacterLevel/XPToNextLevel after level-ups. LevelUp fires GameplayCue.LevelUp, syncs all GAS attributes, awards skill+attribute points. Max level 50 enforced. Multi-level jump support.

5 abilities: GA_Fireball (projectile AoE), GA_GroundSlam (melee AoE+stun), GA_DashStrike (dash+sweep), GA_WarCry (self-buff), GA_ArcaneBeam (new channeled beam with mana drain, sphere sweep, lightning damage).

gotchas: GAS meta-attribute pattern (IncomingXP like IncomingDamage) is the clean way to bridge GE-based XP awards to local game logic — avoids dual-tracking between GAS attributes and local state

ApplyModToAttribute with EGameplayModOp::Override does NOT trigger PostGameplayEffectExecute, only attribute change delegates — safe for syncing GAS back from local authoritative state without recursion

steps.label: Abilities & Skill Trees
steps.description: Active abilities, unlock system, attribute points, ability loadout

decisions.rationale: Fireball, GroundSlam, DashStrike, WarCry already implemented with full GE integration, montage-driven flow, cursor aim, AoE/projectile systems

Data-table-driven unlock/upgrade component with skill point spending, rank tracking, per-rank bonuses. New AbilityUnlockWidget UI with learn/upgrade buttons, rank display, requirement checks, and skill point counter. Auto-assigns newly learned abilities to first empty hotbar slot.

Str/Dex/Int allocation on player character with permanent GAS attribute modification. AttributeAllocationWidget UI now properly bound to player (fixed missing BindToPlayer call in HUD). Live-updating stat previews.

4-slot hotbar system on player character with AssignAbilityToSlot/TryActivateAbilitySlot. AbilityBarWidget displays icons, mana cost, cooldown sweep. Controller has 1-4 key and D-pad bindings. Loadout change auto-refreshes ability bar via delegate.

gotchas: UButton::OnClicked is a dynamic multicast delegate (no lambda support) — use a shared UFUNCTION + IsHovered() TMap lookup pattern for programmatically-created button arrays
BindWidget meta on UUserWidget requires a Blueprint subclass to provide the slot — programmatic children are added into those containers, not replacing them

steps.label: World Zones & Blockouts
steps.description: Zone layout design, blockout levels, NavMesh coverage

decisions.rationale: Data-driven UARPGZoneDefinition with 5 difficulty tiers (Safe/Easy/Medium/Hard/Boss), encounter groups, zone connections graph, level gating, quest gating, fast travel, streaming support
AARPGBlockoutRoom actor with configurable dimensions, room purpose enum (Corridor/SmallRoom/LargeRoom/Arena/Hub/Transition), auto-scaling floor mesh, bounds indicator, scale reference comments
AARPGNavModifierVolume with 4 modifier types (Avoidance/Preferred/Blocked/Chokepoint), UNavModifierComponent integration, editor property change updates. Spawn points already project to NavMesh.

steps.label: Encounters & Bosses
steps.description: Enemy spawn placement, boss encounter, environmental hazards

decisions.rationale: EnemySpawnPoint + SpawnVolume + EncounterVolume already solid with zone-aware difficulty arcs, wave system, respawn, nav-mesh projection
Added ARPGInteractableBase (trigger + prompt), ARPGLockedGate (quest/item gated, slide/rotate open). Existing: LootChest, PhysicsDoor, PhysicsLever, DestructibleActor

ARPGBossCharacter with multi-phase health thresholds, per-phase abilities/buffs/cooldown overrides, transition invulnerability. ARPGBossEncounter arena manager with fog walls, spawn/pre-placed boss, retrigger. BossHealthBarWidget with phase indicator. BTDecorator_BossPhase + BTTask_BossSpecialAttack for BT branching
ARPGEnvironmentalHazard with fire/poison/spike/ice types, periodic GE damage via SetByCaller, one-shot trap mode with rearm, cycle on/off with phase offset, damage type auto-mapping from hazard type

gotchas: UWidgetTree::ConstructWidget<T>() in UE 5.7 takes (TSubclassOf<T>, FName) — cannot pass TEXT() directly as first arg, must pass StaticClass() + FName
UAbilitySystemComponent::GetGameplayAttributeValue() returns float and takes a bool& bFound output param — cannot assign to two separate float variables
TObjectPtr<USphereComponent> implicit conversion to USceneComponent* fails without the full type definition — include the component header in the cpp

steps.label: Interactive World
steps.description: Interactive world objects, zone transitions

decisions.rationale: Fire/poison/spike/ice hazards with GE damage, cycling, one-shot, zone difficulty scaling, AI avoidance, debuff support. Fixed: pre-existing overlap detection on BeginPlay, debuff spam prevention via actor tracking.
NavModifier volumes with Avoidance/Preferred/Blocked/Chokepoint types, custom NavArea classes (Hazard, LowCost, Chokepoint), hazard auto-avoidance via NavArea_Hazard.
Level streaming portals with screen fade, input freezing, cooldown, quest/level gating, spawn point teleport. Fixed: null-check on GetGameInstance().
Multi-phase boss arena with fog walls, player death reset, retrigger support. Fixed: player death delegate leak causing double-binding on retrigger.
Zone volumes with overlap detection and ZoneManager integration. Fixed: null-check on GetGameInstance() in overlap callback.

gotchas: AARPGCharacterBase::InitializeAttributes() is protected — cannot call from external actors like BossEncounter
Dynamic delegate RemoveDynamic must be called in ALL exit paths (not just CompleteEncounter but also OnPlayerDied) to prevent double-binding on retrigger
GetOverlappingActors() on BeginPlay is needed for hazards too — actors spawned inside a hazard volume won't generate overlap events

steps.label: Level Design — Core
steps.description: Blockout geometry, spawn points, level streaming, zone transitions

decisions.rationale: EnemySpawnPoint with respawn/difficulty/zone integration, SpawnVolume with wave-based spawning, difficulty scaling, retrigger support. Added EndPlay timer cleanup and max concurrent enemy cap.
ARPGZoneManager handles streaming load/unload with polling, timeout, fade transitions. ZoneDefinition data assets drive zone graph. Already mature from prior iterations.
ARPGZoneTransition with overlap/interact modes, level/quest gating, cooldown protection, screen fade. ARPGPlayerStart for zone-aware spawn targets. ARPGZoneVolume for spatial zone tracking.

gotchas: AARPGEncounterVolume inherits from ASpawnVolume — adding UPROPERTY to parent that child already declares causes UHT shadowing error
SpawnVolume's SpawnNextInWave is not virtual — max enemy cap must be enforced in the base class for subclasses to benefit

steps.label: Level Design — Advanced
steps.description: Environmental hazards, NavMesh, procedural gen, PCG, vegetation

decisions.rationale: Room/tile-based procedural layout with template pool, weighted selection, connection slot matching, overlap avoidance, and BlockoutRoom spawning. Graph-based room placement with configurable depth, corridor lengths, and seeded RNG.

HISM-based scatter system with biome definitions (ARPGBiomeDefinition data asset + ARPGVegetationScatter actor). Supports density, slope/altitude rules, min spacing, surface alignment, exclusion zones, and scatter layers for props/debris. Uses HierarchicalInstancedStaticMesh for efficient rendering.

Biome definition data asset with per-vegetation-type slope, altitude, density, spacing, scale, alignment, and NavMesh blocking rules. VegetationScatter actor performs line traces to find ground surface, validates placement rules, and uses HISM components for Nanite-compatible instanced rendering.

ARPGEnvironmentalProp actor groups static mesh props, ground decals, and accent point lights into placeable story clusters. Story type classification (Abandoned, BattleScar, Ritual, PathMarker, Warning, TreasureHint, Atmosphere) for design documentation.

ARPGEncounterArena discovers cover points within bounds, builds tactical point data with elevation tiers (Ground/Elevated/High), flanking detection, and cover queries. ARPGCoverPoint provides claim/release, peek positions, and directional coverage checks for AI tactical behavior.
ARPGRoomTemplate data asset with connection slots (directional, width-matched), cover point definitions, prop placements, encounter settings, and generation weight/count constraints.

steps.label: Multiplayer — Replication
steps.description: Replicated properties, RPC framework, GameState replication

decisions.rationale: Added DOREPLIFETIME_CONDITION with COND_SkipOwner for bandwidth optimization, added MaxStamina to vitals, fixed SnapshotVitals to read from GAS attributes (works for all character types, not just player), disabled client tick
Fixed Multicast_AbilityCosmetics to use GameplayCue instead of activating GAS abilities on simulated proxies (was causing gameplay on clients), added autonomous proxy skip
Added FillReplicationParams overrides on GameState (AlwaysRelevant) and MultiplayerGameMode (AlwaysRelevant) using UE 5.7 Iris beta API. Character spatial filtering deferred to per-actor config.

gotchas: BeginReplication() is deprecated in UE 5.7 — override FillReplicationParams() for per-actor Iris config and OnReplicationStartedForIris() for post-start setup
FActorReplicationParams::AlwaysRelevant bypasses spatial filtering for actors that must replicate to all connections (GameState, GameMode)
FActorReplicationParams lives in Net/Iris/ReplicationSystem/EngineReplicationBridge.h
UActorComponent has OnReplicationStartedForIris but not FillReplicationParams — filtering is actor-level only

steps.label: Multiplayer — Sessions & Prediction
steps.description: Session management, network prediction, net relevancy

decisions.rationale: Ability prediction with server confirmation/rejection, position reconciliation with error tolerance and smooth/hard snap correction, input buffering at 30Hz, latency estimation from RTT samples

5-tier relevancy system (AlwaysRelevant/Critical/Standard/Background/Dormant), auto-tier by distance bands, combat relevancy elevation, dormancy support, configurable per-tier update freq/priority/cull distance. Uses UE 5.7 SetNetUpdateFrequency/SetNetCullDistanceSquared APIs

Enhanced with session state machine (8 states), server travel support, rejoin/reconnection with configurable attempts and delay, network/travel failure handling with auto-reconnect for recoverable errors, cached connection strings for rejoin

gotchas: AActor::NetUpdateFrequency is deprecated in UE 5.7 — use SetNetUpdateFrequency()/GetNetUpdateFrequency() instead
AActor::NetCullDistanceSquared is deprecated in UE 5.7 — use SetNetCullDistanceSquared()/GetNetCullDistanceSquared() instead
UFUNCTION returning uint32 is not supported by Blueprint — use int32 for BP-exposed prediction sequence numbers

steps.label: Save/Load Core
steps.description: USaveGame, custom serialization, save and load functions

decisions.rationale: Complete save data structure with progression, inventory (legacy + rich v2), quest states, world state, equipment slots, settings. Versioned at v3.

FARPGItemSaveData with affixes/rarity/level already existed. Added FARPGWorldState with TSet<FName> for bosses, containers, doors, zones, flags. GatherSaveData/RestoreFromSaveData on InventoryComponent bridges live items to save format.

Version-stepped migration chain v1→v2 (legacy inventory to rich items) and v2→v3 (adds quest + world state). Future-version rejection in ValidateSaveGame. Referential integrity check on EquippedSlots.

GatherStateFromWorld() pulls from GameInstance (progression), InventoryComponent (items + equipment), and QuestSubsystem (quest states + pinned quest). World state is always in cache. BuildSaveGameFromCache serializes all.
RestoreStateToWorld() pushes progression to GameInstance, quest states to QuestSubsystem. Inventory deferred to BeginPlay timing via cached accessors. Validation + migration run before apply.
Timer-based auto-save (configurable interval, default 5min) + zone transition auto-save via OnPostMapChange delegate. Separate AutoSave slot. Toggle on/off.
FARPGWorldState tracks defeated bosses, opened containers, unlocked doors, discovered zones, and generic world flags. Blueprint-callable mark/query API on subsystem.

gotchas: GameInstanceSubsystem::Deinitialize must clear timer handles since the world may be torn down concurrently
DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE does not support AddLambda — must use AddDynamic with a UFUNCTION for dynamic delegates
Inventory restoration after load must be deferred to BeginPlay timing — the pawn may not exist yet when LoadFromSlot runs

steps.label: Save Features
steps.description: Auto-save, slot system, save versioning

decisions.rationale: Full state gathering from ASC/inventory/quests/world into SaveGame, with sync and async paths
Validates, migrates (v1→v4), restores all systems. Deferred inventory restore for BeginPlay timing.
Added async auto-save on zone transitions (existing), boss kills (new OnBossDefeated binding), level-ups (new OnPlayerLevelUp binding), and timer. All use SaveToSlotAsync.

3 manual slots (SaveSlot_0-2) + 1 auto-save slot. FARPGSaveSlotInfo struct with character name, level, playtime, zone, timestamp, isAutoSave. GetAllSlotInfo/GetSlotInfo/SaveToManualSlot/LoadFromManualSlot/LoadFromAutoSave API.
Stepped migration chain v1→v2→v3→v4. v4 adds CharacterName to progression. Future versions add new case blocks. ValidateSaveGame rejects unknown future versions.

steps.label: Save / Load
steps.description: USaveGame, auto-save, slot system

decisions.rationale: UARPGSaveGame with progression, inventory (legacy+rich), quests, world state, settings. Well-structured with clear field comments.
Sync/async save, load with validation, migration, state gather/restore from all live systems. Added save-in-progress guard to prevent concurrent async saves.
Timer-based (5min default) + event-triggered (zone transition, level-up, boss kill). Added 10s throttle cooldown to prevent rapid-fire from simultaneous events.

New SaveSlotWidget with Save/Load mode toggle, 3 manual + 1 auto-save slots, metadata display, overwrite/delete confirmation overlay, auto-refresh on save/load completion. Integrated into HUD with ToggleSaveScreen.
v1→v2→v3→v4 stepped migration chain. Validates integrity (level, health, equipped slot referential consistency). Rejects future-version saves gracefully.
UPROPERTY-based serialization covers all types including TMap, TSet, TArray of USTRUCTs. FArchive custom serialize not needed — UE handles these natively.

gotchas: UHorizontalBox::AddChildToHorizontalBox returns UHorizontalBoxSlot* (not lvalue reference) — cannot bind to auto&
Include Components/HorizontalBoxSlot.h for SetSize/SetHorizontalAlignment on HorizontalBox slots

steps.label: Debug & Logging
steps.description: Structured logging, debug draw helpers, console commands

decisions.rationale: 10 custom log categories covering all systems: Combat, AI, Inventory, Ability, Quest, World, Save, UI, Audio, Network

Blueprint-callable static library with master toggle CVar (ARPG.Debug.Draw), 8 draw functions: weapon trace, ability range, hit impact, AI path, perception range, attack cone, spawn point, box volume, overlap sphere. ENABLE_DRAW_DEBUG guards for shipping.

UCheatManager subclass with 8 commands: ARPGGod (invulnerable+mana), ARPGSetLevel, ARPGGiveXP, ARPGHeal, ARPGKillAll, ARPGSpawnEnemy (BP path+level), ARPGDamageTarget (crosshair trace), ARPGShowStats. Registered on PlayerController via CheatClass.

gotchas: FColor::Orange and other FColor constants cannot be used as UHT default parameters — use FLinearColor for Blueprint-exposed color params
GetPlayerViewPoint returns FRotator not FVector for the rotation output — use ViewRot.Vector() for direction

steps.label: Performance Optimization
steps.description: Object pooling, tick optimization, async asset loading

decisions.rationale: UARPGObjectPool GameInstanceSubsystem with Acquire/Release/PreWarm/SetMaxPoolSize, weak-pointer cleanup, deactivation/activation lifecycle

UARPGTickOptimizer WorldSubsystem with distance-based tick interval (near/mid/far tiers), plus direct fixes: CombatFeedbackComponent tick-on-demand, LootChest tick-on-animation-only, WorldItem auto-registers with optimizer
UARPGAsyncLoader GameInstanceSubsystem wrapping FStreamableManager with single/batch async loading, priority support, handle retention, and sync fallback

steps.label: Packaging
steps.description: Build config, automation, versioning

decisions.rationale: Game target has Shipping/Development defines (POF_SHIPPING, POF_DEV_TOOLS), logging disabled in Shipping. Editor target left clean to share build environment.
DefaultGame.ini configured with pak compression, skip editor content, share material shader code, deterministic shader order, directories to always/never cook, async loading, GC tuning.
Win64 DX12 default, staging directory, renderer settings. Console/mobile deferred until SDK availability.
BuildPackage.bat with development/shipping args, auto build-number increment, compile, content validation, UAT BuildCookRun with pak/compress/stage/archive.
UARPGBuildVersionSubsystem reads major.minor.patch.build from DefaultGame.ini, auto-incremented by build script. MainMenuWidget pulls live version string from subsystem.
UContentValidationCommandlet checks missing asset references and oversized textures, integrated into build pipeline.

gotchas: Editor targets that share build environment with UnrealEditor cannot add GlobalDefinitions — UBT rejects property modifications on shared targets. Only Game/Server targets with unique build environments can use custom defines.
GConfig->GetInt/GetString with GGameIni reads from DefaultGame.ini section paths matching the UCLASS path

learnings: UCharacterMovementComponent::PerchRadiusThreshold controls how close to ledge edges the character can stand
bMaintainHorizontalGroundVelocity is key for consistent speed on ramps/slopes
APlayerController::InputKey(FInputKeyParams) is final in UE 5.7 — override InputKey(const FInputKeyEventArgs&) instead, include InputKeyEventArgs.h. Use Params.IsGamepad() for device detection.
UHT cannot parse TArray<AActor*>() as a default parameter — use AutoCreateRefTerm meta specifier and move the param before defaulted params
UPhysicalMaterial already has a SurfaceType member — custom subclasses must use a different name (e.g. GameSurfaceType)
FVector_NetQuantize (from HitResult.ImpactPoint) cannot be used in ternary with FVector — explicit FVector() cast needed
ChaosSolverEngine, GeometryCollectionEngine, FieldSystemEngine modules needed for Chaos destruction in UE 5.7
Virtual IsDead() on base character class enables AnimInstance death state without coupling to specific subclass bIsAlive flags
UE MotionWarping warp targets must be set BEFORE montage playback starts — the MotionWarping notify state reads them during the montage window
Frame-to-frame weapon sweep tracing (previous vs current socket positions) catches fast-swing hits that single-frame traces miss
Re-acquiring warp target on each combo section advance keeps magnetism tracking moving targets during multi-hit combos
FGameplayEffectSpec::AddDynamicAssetTag() is the proper way to attach damage type metadata to a GE spec — the damage execution and PostGameplayEffectExecute can both read it via GetDynamicAssetTags()
UAbilitySystemComponent::ExecuteGameplayCue() fires a one-shot cue without needing a GE — useful for hit impact feedback from PostGameplayEffectExecute
Elemental resistances should be capped below 1.0 (0.9 cap) in PreAttributeChange to prevent full immunity
UStaticMesh::NaniteSettings is deprecated in 5.7 — use IsNaniteEnabled() and GetNaniteSettings() accessor functions instead
UAudioComponent::bEnableDefaultMultichannelEvaluation does not exist in UE 5.7 — removed without replacement
EMaxConcurrentResolutionRule is a namespace enum in UE 5.7, not an enum class — must use TEnumAsByte<EMaxConcurrentResolutionRule::Type> for UPROPERTY
UAudioComponent::SetBoolParameter() exists natively in UE 5.7 — no need for int workaround
CanMove() should always check IsDead() as first gate to prevent dead characters from processing movement input — especially important for enemy AI that may call AddMovementInput after death
UAnimNotify::NotifyColor set in constructor won't update when properties change in editor — override GetEditorColor() instead for dynamic color based on property values
AnimNotifyState is more designer-friendly than two bookend instant notifies for window-based concepts (combo window, invulnerability frames) — the duration bar is intuitive
Montage_GetCurrentSection() returns the active section name — useful for section-aware AnimBP transitions and per-section logic
GE_Heal should modify IncomingHeal meta attribute (not Health directly) to go through the full heal pipeline with GameplayCue support in PostGameplayEffectExecute

Enemy abilities should use distinct Ability.Enemy.* tags rather than reusing player ability tags (e.g. Ability.Melee.LightAttack) to prevent tag-based filtering collisions between player and enemy ability sets
GA_HitReact should block on State.Attacking/Invulnerable/Dashing to avoid interrupting active player actions — hit react is a lower priority response
GA_UsePotion is fire-and-forget (CommitAbility + ApplyEffectToSelf + EndAbility) — no montage needed, cooldown gates usage
UAudioComponent created via NewObject on a subsystem (no world) won't produce sound — must RegisterComponentWithWorld after a world exists, or create lazily
FAudioDeviceHandle from World->GetAudioDevice() provides ActivateReverbEffect/DeactivateReverbEffect for runtime reverb control without AReverbVolume actors
GConfig->SetFloat/GetFloat with GGameUserSettingsIni is the lightweight way to persist audio settings without a full SaveGame system
UDragDropOperation already has a Payload member — do not re-declare it in subclasses or UHT will error on shadowing
GA_HitReact must set/clear bIsHitReacting on the character so CanMove() properly gates movement during hit reactions — without this, the character can walk freely while playing a hit-react montage
FGameplayAbilityTargetData::GetHitResult() can return nullptr even when TargetData.Num() > 0 — always null-check before dereferencing
APlayerController::PlayDynamicForceFeedback() is the simplest way to trigger gamepad vibration — no ForceFeedbackEffect asset needed, just intensity + duration + channel booleans
Test dummy respawn requires cancelling all GAS abilities first (to clear State.Dead from ActivationOwnedTags), then re-granting abilities and re-initializing attributes

BT task nodes are shared singletons by default (bCreateNodeInstance=false) — per-instance state MUST use GetInstanceMemorySize()/NodeMemory, not member variables. Storing FDelegateHandle or float state as member vars corrupts when multiple enemies share the same BT.
FPathFollowingRequestResult is forward-declared in AIController.h — include Navigation/PathFollowingComponent.h to use it (known UE 5.7 gotcha)
WaitForMessage(OwnerComp, UBrainComponent::AIMessage_MoveFinished) is the cleanest way to wait for MoveTo completion in BT tasks without manual delegate plumbing
BTService nodes are also shared singletons like BTTask nodes — NoLOSTimer as a member variable corrupts when multiple enemies share the same BT. Must use GetInstanceMemorySize()/NodeMemory.
ASC->OnAbilityEnded fires for ALL abilities ending on that ASC, not just the one you activated — must filter by FGameplayAbilitySpecHandle to avoid premature BT task completion
WaitForMessage(OwnerComp, UBrainComponent::AIMessage_MoveFinished) is safer than lambda-based OnRequestFinished delegates in BT tasks — avoids dangling reference captures on OwnerComp
GameplayDebugger module in UE 5.7 is at Source/Runtime/GameplayDebugger, module name is 'GameplayDebugger'
StateTree plugin modules: 'StateTreeModule' (runtime) and 'GameplayStateTreeModule' (AI integration)
State Tree tasks/conditions/evaluators are USTRUCT-based (not UCLASS) with separate instance data structs
FGameplayDebuggerCategory::SetDataPackReplication<T> requires T to have a Serialize(FArchive&) method
UAISenseConfig_Hearing uses HearingRange (not SightRadius-style naming)
UMaterialInterface::GetUsedTextures() with quality/featurelevel params is deprecated in 5.7 — use the parameterless overload
TArray<T*>::Sort() with const T* lambda fails due to TDereferenceWrapper — use Algo::Sort() with Algo/Sort.h include
UHT parameter shadowing: UFUNCTION params cannot share names with UPROPERTY members in the same UCLASS — use InRarity instead of Rarity to avoid 'shadowing is not allowed' UHT error
FOnItemPickedUpStatic (static multicast delegate) allows HUD to bind once globally without per-actor references — useful for pickup notification feeds
SetRenderTranslation offsets from the widget's layout anchor — for world-projected damage numbers use SetPositionInViewport with screen coordinates instead
UMG widgets created in HUD::BeginPlay but never bound to data sources are inert — must call BindToInventory/BindToAbilitySystem from BindWidgetsToPlayer
UUserWidget has no SetRootWidget() method — use WidgetTree->RootWidget = widget to set programmatic root
UFUNCTION cannot return const USTRUCT* — use a copy-out pattern (bool GetFoo(FName ID, FStruct& Out) const) for Blueprint exposure
UARPGInventoryComponent methods take UARPGItemDefinition* not FName — dialogue item actions need Blueprint wiring or asset manager lookup
GAS meta-attribute pattern (IncomingXP like IncomingDamage) is the clean way to bridge GE-based XP awards to local game logic — avoids dual-tracking between GAS attributes and local state

ApplyModToAttribute with EGameplayModOp::Override does NOT trigger PostGameplayEffectExecute, only attribute change delegates — safe for syncing GAS back from local authoritative state without recursion
UButton::OnClicked is a dynamic multicast delegate (no lambda support) — use a shared UFUNCTION + IsHovered() TMap lookup pattern for programmatically-created button arrays
BindWidget meta on UUserWidget requires a Blueprint subclass to provide the slot — programmatic children are added into those containers, not replacing them
UWidgetTree::ConstructWidget<T>() in UE 5.7 takes (TSubclassOf<T>, FName) — cannot pass TEXT() directly as first arg, must pass StaticClass() + FName
UAbilitySystemComponent::GetGameplayAttributeValue() returns float and takes a bool& bFound output param — cannot assign to two separate float variables
TObjectPtr<USphereComponent> implicit conversion to USceneComponent* fails without the full type definition — include the component header in the cpp
AARPGCharacterBase::InitializeAttributes() is protected — cannot call from external actors like BossEncounter
Dynamic delegate RemoveDynamic must be called in ALL exit paths (not just CompleteEncounter but also OnPlayerDied) to prevent double-binding on retrigger
GetOverlappingActors() on BeginPlay is needed for hazards too — actors spawned inside a hazard volume won't generate overlap events
AARPGEncounterVolume inherits from ASpawnVolume — adding UPROPERTY to parent that child already declares causes UHT shadowing error
SpawnVolume's SpawnNextInWave is not virtual — max enemy cap must be enforced in the base class for subclasses to benefit
BeginReplication() is deprecated in UE 5.7 — override FillReplicationParams() for per-actor Iris config and OnReplicationStartedForIris() for post-start setup
FActorReplicationParams::AlwaysRelevant bypasses spatial filtering for actors that must replicate to all connections (GameState, GameMode)
FActorReplicationParams lives in Net/Iris/ReplicationSystem/EngineReplicationBridge.h
UActorComponent has OnReplicationStartedForIris but not FillReplicationParams — filtering is actor-level only
AActor::NetUpdateFrequency is deprecated in UE 5.7 — use SetNetUpdateFrequency()/GetNetUpdateFrequency() instead
AActor::NetCullDistanceSquared is deprecated in UE 5.7 — use SetNetCullDistanceSquared()/GetNetCullDistanceSquared() instead
UFUNCTION returning uint32 is not supported by Blueprint — use int32 for BP-exposed prediction sequence numbers
GameInstanceSubsystem::Deinitialize must clear timer handles since the world may be torn down concurrently
DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE does not support AddLambda — must use AddDynamic with a UFUNCTION for dynamic delegates
Inventory restoration after load must be deferred to BeginPlay timing — the pawn may not exist yet when LoadFromSlot runs
UHorizontalBox::AddChildToHorizontalBox returns UHorizontalBoxSlot* (not lvalue reference) — cannot bind to auto&
Include Components/HorizontalBoxSlot.h for SetSize/SetHorizontalAlignment on HorizontalBox slots
FColor::Orange and other FColor constants cannot be used as UHT default parameters — use FLinearColor for Blueprint-exposed color params
GetPlayerViewPoint returns FRotator not FVector for the rotation output — use ViewRot.Vector() for direction

Editor targets that share build environment with UnrealEditor cannot add GlobalDefinitions — UBT rejects property modifications on shared targets. Only Game/Server targets with unique build environments can use custom defines.
